author: metawops
description: Export tables from a pane in reading mode into CSV files.

manifest.author: Stefan Wolfrum
manifest.description: This plugin allows for exporting tables from a pane in reading mode into CSV files.
manifest.name: Table to CSV Exporter

name: Table to CSV Exporter

releases.author: metawops
releases.description:
Release notes for v0.1.4:
* The separation character can now be selected in a dropdown menu and includes the tab and many other characters. Defaults to semicolon now.
* The data quotation character can now be selected in a dropdown and can either be the double quotes (`"`) or single quotes (`'`) character.

releases.author: metawops
releases.description:
Release notes for v0.1.3:
* added handling of CR/LF characters in data cells (see new setting)

releases.author: metawops
releases.description:
Changes in this release:
* Removed a now unneccessary text from the settings dialog

releases.author: metawops
releases.description:
Changes in 0.1.1:

* Make sure that only the first table of a pane in reading mode get's exported.
* Make sure that no export happens if there's no table at all in a pane in reading mode.
* Corrected `README.md` accordingly.
